readyToPublish.title: Bring Your Own Chat
readyToPublish.notes: Narrative rescued from orphan state 2026-05-30; PM ratified expedite to Tue Jun 2 (front-load over tail) because it carries PM's core articulation of the distribution philosophy that may not have been said this way elsewhere yet. Beats 3-9 shift forward by one slot to accommodate. Through-line: the April 8 moment when PA's MCP-server feasibility research surfaced Bring-Your-Own-Chat as a distribution reframe — the agent meets you where you already work, intelligence layer becomes the product rather than the chat container. Needs PM voice-pass (3 ADD + 1 CONSIDER placeholder) + frontmatter; PM voice-passing 2026-05-30 alongside today's + tomorrow's insights to get footer teases lined up.

readyToPublish.title: Upstream of the Floor
readyToPublish.notes: Beat 3 of 9-beat narrative slate. Multi-day A+B-plot. A-plot: Apr 25 STOP CONDITION (stale server) + Scenario 1 finding (floor isn't reachable; pre-classifier intercepts) → PPM 'audit-shape not build-quality' reframe → Architect 'ethics is upstream' → #1004 design through ship in 6 days. B-plot: Apr 26 mail-cascade comedy (CXO can't see Exec kickoff; Docs's subshell drift compounds) → targeted mailbox-discipline norm in 30 minutes. Through-line: fix one layer upstream of where the symptom shows.

readyToPublish.title: Be Prepared (Preparatory Work as Valuable Work)
Permission to Pause
readyToPublish.notes: Renamed from "The Deliberate Pause (disambiguate)" 2026-05-09 — narrative used "Deliberate Pause" name in Mar 22 publish; insight covers Time Lord Alert discipline (3 pauses: methodology audit cadence shift / Colleague Test v2 8-day hold / M1 v1-I'd-want-to-redo holds); central methodology phrase from CLAUDE.md "permission to pause and discuss uncertainty"

readyToPublish.title: Where Would the Data Come From?
readyToPublish.notes: Beat 4 of 9-beat narrative slate. Single-day Apr 30. Lead Dev files #1018 Phase 1 design 7:35 AM proposing real-traffic calibration before flag-flip; PM asks ~7:45 AM where the real-traffic data would come from (alpha = no real users → catch-22 named). 7:55 AM flip-now memo with 3-phase simulation-first reframe. 8:23 AM Architect ratifies with ADR-061 v1.0. 1:30 PM Phase F flag-flip merged → multi-week #992 ETHICS-ACTIVATE arc closes. Through-line: alpha plans drift toward production-shaped sequencing; ask where the data would come from.

readyToPublish.title: The Pace Verified
readyToPublish.notes: Beat 5 of 9-beat narrative slate. Multi-day A+B+coda. A-plot: May 2 cluster-commit (#1018+#1006/#1007/#1008 atomic, 58h design-to-ship) + audit-cascade catches conceptual drift before gameplan + May 3 record day (8 issues end-to-end + 221 new tests + 0 regressions + 3 mid-flight architectural calls: DDD strict-rewrite / channel-agnostic Push / two-layer COMPOSTED guardrail). B-plot: May 4 Architect first sustained workstream review — verdict structurally sound, 5 non-blocking cleanup items; PM instinct verified by independent review. Coda: May 5 multi-phase compounding payoff (#900 ships ~2h vs ~14h estimate because #1052 + Phase 1 state machine landed prior). Through-line: sustained pace from preparatory pieces compounding, not heroic effort.

readyToPublish.title: Critical vs Commodity Work in a Role
readyToPublish.notes: Insight drawn from Apr 23-27 cohort migration wave + PP-002 filing (Apr 27). Cohort-wide independent convergence on the same role-shape distinction: each role has a critical subset where distinctive judgment lives + larger commoditizable surface. Seven Section-6 reflections all named the shape in different vocabularies. Title is public-prose form of PP-002 (internal 'load-bearing' → public 'critical' per May 16 memory). Generalizes beyond AI — any knowledge-worker role.

readyToPublish.title: The Solo Founder Paradox
readyToPublish.notes: February insight backlog — execution exceeds judgment capacity

readyToPublish.title: First Subagent in Production
readyToPublish.notes: Beat 6 of 9-beat narrative slate. Two-day arc. May 6 prep day: Lead Dev preps #1053 STANDUP-TEST-MIGRATION with 3 audit-cascade gates (Issue 24+1; Gameplan 27+4 N/A; Prompts 36+6 N/A). Cursor-template N/A-rate observation produces template-drift-signal memory + #1058 hygiene tracking. May 7 deployment: subagent runs 6:48-7:18 AM; Phase 2 reframe (12 tests already passing; subagent annotated rather than improvising); cross-agent git collision during run (chained && doesn't gate on result, only exit code); commit `69aa5e74` merged 7:30 AM. Two new memory entries refining branch-show-current discipline (gate-on-result + subagent-requires-real-worktree-or-foreground-commits-first). Through-line: first production subagent deployment surfaces the methodology's fourth layer (scaffolding around the deployment).

readyToPublish.title: Hypothesis Refuted
readyToPublish.notes: Beat 7 of 9-beat narrative slate. Two-day arc. May 8: Run-4 retest shows Quality 65.6% (apparent 6-pt drop from baseline); #1064 P0 filed hypothesizing LLM fabrication regression; investigation finds 0 of 10 auto-fails pure fabrication, 7 false flags from judge-calibration drift + auto-fail amplification + fixture pollution (Q56 smoking gun: 15 real todos in DB from prior runs mutating state without cleanup); 3 narrow real bugs. CEO directive: do not enter M2f until benchmark recovered. May 9: fixture reset (15 stale + 111 orphan wiped) + rubric recalibration memo + 3 fixes → Run 7 68.9% PASS exceeds baseline → M2f unblocked. Same day M2f Group A+B closed via dead-code deletions (-1813 LOC net) producing Pattern-067 (Issue-Body Reality Mismatch) — 3-of-5 issues described code that didn't exist. Through-line: when a measurement or description has drifted from the system it tracks, fix the reference not the system.

readyToPublish.title: Patterns Naming Patterns
readyToPublish.notes: Insight drawn from May 9-11 Pattern-067 slot collision. Lead Dev files P-067 (Issue-Body Reality Mismatch) May 9; CIO independently files different P-067 (Silent State Mutation) May 11; Architect surfaces collision; first-filed-wins resolution + CIO renumbers to P-068+P-069; Pattern-068 names parent meta-pattern over branch-drift+index-drift+residue-drift+working-tree-path-fragmentation family. Methodological response: slot-allocation check in filing convention (catalog Pattern-063 pattern applying to the catalog itself). Generalizes to any growing taxonomy with parallel authors.

readyToPublish.title: Extension Without Integration
readyToPublish.notes: March insight backlog

readyToPublish.title: Branch-or-Anchor in Ninety Minutes
readyToPublish.notes: Beat 8 of 9-beat narrative slate. Single-day arc May 10. PPM files M2d gate criteria framing new rubric as 'Colleague Test R/C/T — adapted for UI'; CXO catches as Pattern-063 (Parallel-Authoring Drift) recreation; PPM concedes + branches per Methodology-24 (Branch-or-Anchor) to UI Lifecycle Verification Rubric v0.1 with explicit provenance; Architect ratifies as cleanest application yet (caught at instrument-naming moment, not after drift accumulates); CXO documents at CT v2.3 → v2.3.1 cross-referencing as canonical worked-example. End-to-end ~90 min inside same workstream-review cycle. Through-line: methodology catalog moves from documentation to language — anyone in cohort can speak in it.

readyToPublish.title: The Hook and the Worktree
readyToPublish.notes: Beat 9 of 9-beat narrative slate — slate-closing piece. Multi-day A+B arc. A-plot: May 13 close-issue-properly audit finds 13-of-13 unchecked descriptions; three remediation layers (memory pin + #1083 pre-commit hook + PM standing directive); 6 of 13 reopened with scope-shaped gaps; May 14 first clean application. B-plot: May 15 PPM 14-commit morning produces 4 foreign-state-capture incidents on shared main despite 5-week stack of commit-discipline memory pins; PPM concludes layered discipline can surface but not prevent; PM ratifies worktree-default at 7:13 AM via PPM relay; Docs codifies in CLAUDE.md by evening; first-day data: clean commits. Through-line: when procedures keep leaking, the next gain comes from changing the environment so the failure mode disappears structurally — discipline becoming infrastructure. Closes the 9-beat arc (Apr 23 → May 15).

readyToPublish.title: From Briefing to Vision
readyToPublish.notes: Narrative rescued from orphan state 2026-05-30; tails after Beat 9 per PM May 28 backfill plan (less time-sensitive than BYOC). Through-line: PA's first 11 days, cold-start through day-11 productivity — reading sixty ADRs day one to revising the project vision by day eight, then 10 issues + sprint plan by day eleven. The compounding context payoff; cold-start cost as foundation. Needs PM voice-pass (3 ADD + 1 CONSIDER placeholder) + frontmatter before publish.

readyToPublish.title: Climbing Higher When the Platform Laps You
readyToPublish.notes: Insight drawn from PM May 18 directive after Anthropic Outcomes shipped May 6 (verification-as-API). Through-line: when the platform productizes your DIY work, the right disposition is climbing higher on the value chain (build on the now-stable thing) not defending sunk cost. The bespoke work was training material for understanding the productized version, not a separate product line. Three rules: don't defend sunk cost; don't dismiss platform sight-unseen; map what migrates/stays/climbs-to. Pairs with The Practice That Got Retired (Sun Jul 5) on training-material framing. Connects to Ship #044 candidate spine 'Platform Lapped Us, We Climbed' confirmed by PM 2026-05-24.

readyToPublish.title: The Practice That Got Retired
readyToPublish.notes: Insight drawn from May 17-21 V1 Duty Cycle adopt→retire arc. CIO/HOST/Docs adopted hourly cron mail-detection practice May 17-18; PM retired May 21 in favor of richer 3-loop design (mail + tasks + flywheel orchestrator + per-agent docs + IDLE state + day-bookended rituals). Methodology entries from V1 era preserved across retirement. Through-line: practices don't need to last to be valuable — sometimes the most valuable thing a practice does is reveal what should replace it. Retirement is harvest not failure when teaching payment is complete. Pairs with Climbing Higher When the Platform Laps You (Sat Jul 4) on training-material framing.

readyToPublish.title: When the Documentation Drifts
readyToPublish.notes: Insight drawn from May 19-20 destructive-manifest-sync incident (Pattern-073 instance #14). Lead Dev May 20 ~35 min morning recovery after skill ran with overwrite-not-append behavior contradicting its docs; 13 mailbox manifests restored. Through-line: docs and code drift silently because they share no clock — cost is asymmetric (paid later, by someone other than the introducer). Pattern-naming doesn't prevent drift but collapses recovery cost and accumulates data. Discipline: code as source of truth; docs as until-proven-otherwise; verify at moment of invocation not moment of reading. Deeper read: architectural-humility problem not documentation-hygiene problem. Pairs with The Server Crashed Mid-Draft (Sun Jul 12) on workflow vulnerability.

readyToPublish.title: The Server Crashed Mid-Draft
readyToPublish.notes: Insight drawn from May 21 Beat-7 session-end stranded draft + May 23 reconstruction recovery + May 17 commit-immediately-after-Write memory pin. Through-line: new files in untracked state sit in a vulnerability window — visible to you but outside the repository's safety net. Asymmetric loss (high-frequency tiny win, low-frequency total loss) is the shape of disciplines people skip until catastrophic regret. Mechanical discipline closes the window: commit + push immediately after Write, before any other substantive tool call. Pairs with When the Documentation Drifts (Sat Jul 11) on workflow vulnerability — invisible failure modes in gaps between surfaces.

readyToPublish.title: Mechanical First, Then Read
readyToPublish.notes: Insight drawn from May 21 PM correction on Voice-of-a-Denial proofreading — missed 3 of 6 body-prose semicolons by eye despite knowing the rule. Through-line: pattern-recognition for known violations is automatable; meaning-judgment isn't. Attention is finite — spend it on what only attention can do; automate what doesn't need attention. Mechanical pass before read-for-meaning pass frees attention for human-only work. Generalizes beyond proofreading: code review (lint pass + architectural pass), security audit, design critique — same shape. Pairs with What Staff Reports Don't Show (Sun Jul 19) on look-beyond-the-obvious view.

readyToPublish.title: What Staff Reports Don't Show
readyToPublish.notes: Insight drawn from May 20 PM correction on Ship #043 v0.2 — drafted from 6 workstream memos alone, missed entire engineering arc that lived in omnibus logs. Through-line: staff reports filter (well-intentioned + structurally appropriate at report level); cross-product of staff filters is smaller than what happened. Chief reading only staff reports gets coherent narrative built from filter union, not ground truth. Discipline: chief reads logs (omnibus + session + artifacts) AND staff reports — forms views on source set, uses staff reports for framing. Generalizes to any role consuming filtered front-line reports: PMs reading status updates, executives reading dashboards, professors reading TA summaries, journalists reading press releases. Pairs with Mechanical First Then Read (Sat Jul 18) on look-beyond-the-obvious view.

readyToPublish.title: From Abstraction to Worked Example
readyToPublish.notes: Insight rescued from orphan state 2026-05-29 (drafted Apr 26, untracked until Docs cleanup pass). Through-line: three concrete worked examples + one contrast made Lead Dev's ethics-enforcement architectural choice click in two minutes when descriptions wouldn't — the abstraction-clicks-via-worked-example method. Generalizes to API design, methodology patterns, user-facing copy. Needs PM voice-pass (1 ADD + 1 CONSIDER placeholder) + frontmatter before publish. Pairs with Meta-Observation Pattern (Sun Jul 26) as communication-craft weekend.

readyToPublish.title: The Meta-Observation Pattern
readyToPublish.notes: Insight rescued from orphan state 2026-05-29 (drafted Apr 26, untracked until Docs cleanup pass). Through-line: three pieces published that week all described coordination while being part of coordination — the system-using-itself-to-write-about-itself pattern. Carries in-body CONSIDER flag re self-observation arc density; PM ratified KEEP 2026-05-24. Needs PM voice-pass (1 ADD + 1 CONSIDER) + frontmatter before publish. Pairs with From Abstraction to Worked Example (Sat Jul 25) as communication-craft weekend.
